properties.description: Copies 14 checkmarkdata tables from odw_standardised_db.dbo.* (via ls_ssql_builtin) to ODW.* (via ls_sql_mipins) in parallel with audit logging per table.

activities.name: ForEach-CopyTables
activities.description: Iterates over the table config and runs each copy in parallel.

activities.name: Copy-Table
activities.description: Truncate target and insert all rows from source. Mapping is driven by dataset schema.
